name: clientRetentionReport
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). COMPONENT-EXACT shape: RevenueRetentionPanel sends a sole-key {artifact:{data:{clients}}} body that the dispatch peel unwraps to {clients}; handler reads artifact.data.clients. RETURNS {totalClients,repeatClients,repeatRate,averageLifetimeValue,totalRevenue,atRiskCount,atRiskClients:[{name,daysSinceVisit,churnRisk,lifetimeValue}]} — the EXACT keys the panel renders (NOTE: the field is averageLifetimeValue, NOT avgLifetimeValue — the panel was reading the wrong key, fixed 2026-06-28). churnRisk high>180d / medium>90d since lastVisit; atRisk = high|medium only. POISON: lifetime value via parseFloat+Number.isFinite so '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' collapse to 0; totalRevenue/averageLifetimeValue stay finite. try/catch wrapped. Pinned by server/tests/services-lens-macros.test.js.
